title: Gravestone
description: Saves your items in a grave when you die to protect them from despawning
body:
![Gravestone title](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/n8-M4x/Gravestone-Mod/refs/heads/main/gravestone_title.png)

## Gravestone Mod

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

**Spawns a grave with your vanilla items saved inside.**
**By right-clicking the grave block, you open the inventory and can easily swap your items with the ones in the grave.**

![Grave Gui Screen with your current items and the dead players items](https://github.com/n8-M4x/Gravestone-Mod/blob/main/screenshot_grave_1.png?raw=true)
![items swapped with the items in the grave by pressing the button](https://github.com/n8-M4x/Gravestone-Mod/blob/main/screenshot_grave_2.png?raw=true)

Currently works with vanilla size player inventory no matter what items.

Works in Singleplayer and on servers with both environments requiring the mod

How it works:

When a player dies, either in singleplayer or multiplayer, their items are stored in the gravestone block that spawns on their death location.
- If they die in the void, their grave will be at the lowest possible block
- If they die in the above build limit, their grave will be at build limit


The grave is explosion proof but if you mine it, the items inside drop
